Department of Corporate Communications

The Department of Corporate Communication prepares a comprehensive communication plan by determining the necessary strategies to ensure the effective promotion of our University. It is responsible for announcing all the activities of our university in the fields of education, research and social responsibility in the most effective way both inside and outside the institution. In this context, it conveys the vision, mission and values of our University to a wide audience by using various communication tools and channels for target audiences.

The Department of Corporate Communication carries out strategic communication activities in order to increase the brand value of our university and strengthen its corporate image. It effectively promotes our university's achievements, innovative projects and contributions to society through media relations, digital communication, event management and corporate publications. In addition, improving internal communication, it ensures that academic and administrative staff as well as students can easily access information about the university.
